title: Commodities: Oil Slides Despite Stalled U.S.-Iran Talks
summary: Oil prices fell even as U.S.-Iran nuclear talks remain stalled, adding uncertainty to energy markets. Key commodity ETFs including USO and GLD are in focus.

title: Chevron: Well Positioned Amid Middle East Uncertainty
summary: Analysts argue Chevron is well-positioned to weather Middle East geopolitical risks given its diversified asset base. CVX remains a key energy stock to watch.

title: POET Technologies: Caught Between Hype And Reality
summary: A new analysis questions whether POET Technologies can live up to investor expectations surrounding its optical interposer platform. Valuation concerns are highlighted.

title: THOR Industries Q3 Review: Bad Times Are Rolling In
summary: THOR Industries faces headwinds as RV demand slows, with Q3 results disappointing analysts. The stock outlook has turned cautious amid weakening consumer spending.

title: TDVI: Option ETF That Provides AI Growth Potential And Monthly Income
summary: TDVI is an options-based ETF offering exposure to AI-driven tech names like TSM and IBM while generating monthly income. It targets investors seeking growth with yield.

title: Rent the Runway Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Rent the Runway reported Q1 fiscal 2026 revenue of $89.9M, up 29.2% year-over-year, and reiterated its full-year outlook. Management cited improving subscriber trends.
